DisablingRoomGroupsDescription: Groups will be saved but hidden. Re-enable in Profile, File management.
EmptyGroupDescription: There are no rooms here. Try adding a room or remove this group.
RemoveGroupConfirmation: You are about to delete group of rooms. Are you sure you want to proceed?
RemoveGroupInfo: The rooms included in group will be displayed in the All Rooms section.
RoomAddedToGroup: The selected room has been added to <1>{{groupName}}</1>.
RoomGroupingSettingDescription: You can group rooms into folders and easily switch between them.

RoomsRemovedFromGroup: The selected rooms have been removed from <1>{{groupName}}</1>.
